name: Wine / Proton Prefixes

bios.notes: Wine/Proton launches depend on prefixes, environment variables, installers, and working directories rather than BIOS files.

library_behavior.playlist_target_preference: launcher script, desktop file, shortcut, or executable inside a prefix

frontend_notes.steamdeck: Steam Deck workflows often use Proton prefixes and launch options that must be preserved.

notes: Do not edit prefixes, registry hives, save folders, or launch scripts without explicit approval.
Treat Wine/Proton entries as installed application state, not portable ROM files.
